basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has published the Assistant Project Engineer Notification 2026 on its IIT Guwahati Official Website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Assistant Project Engineer position. Candidates holding a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Engineering are eligible to apply online. The application process will be active till 10 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Assistant Project Engineer position at IIT Guwahati is 10th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Assistant Project Engineer role, candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering. This is the primary educational requirement for the position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Assistant Project Engineer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 29,750/- per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration for the contract period.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Project Engineer position in the Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Assistant Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Project Engineer position at IIT Guwahati will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview based on their qualifications and application.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The position of Assistant Project Engineer is offered on a contractual basis by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITG/II&SI/Project Staff Rectt-2026/108. This number should be used for reference when applying or inquiring about the position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam. Candidates applying for this position should be willing to work in this location.

faq.question: Q10. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Assistant Project Engineer position at IIT Guwahati is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.
